_comment: WORKED EXAMPLE — the gastify binding of the A3 command-center generators, filled in. This is the ONE file that carries a project's bindings OUT of the generator source: project identity, the paths the loaders read, the test corpora (key · runner · kind), the leaf reports, and one block per adopted entity mapping its slug to test regex, proof sets, source files and model classes. The generators (build_center_a3.py + _a3_*) read ONLY from here and adoption.json — nothing project-specific is hardcoded in the Python. Every `entities` key MUST be a slug registered in adoption.json (unknown-slug aborts the build, the D123 rule applied to config). Copy center.config.template.json into docs/site/center/ at adoption and fill it; this example shows a filled-in result.
_commands_comment: Capture commands run by scripts/refresh_center.sh <mode>, one shell line per entry, executed from the repo root. `regen` (the default) never runs a suite; these turn the sources on.

junit: cd web && CI=true npx vitest run --reporter=default --reporter=junit --outputFile=../tests/results/web-junit.xml
coverage: cd web && CI=true npx vitest run --coverage --coverage.reporter=json-summary --coverage.reporter=html --coverage.reportsDirectory=../tests/results/web-coverage

_entities_comment: One block per entity registered in adoption.json. `test_rx` is required (it claims test files into the corpus matrix, even before a section is built); `proofs`/`code`/`models` are added when the entity's section is adopted and its feature page is built. Every key here MUST exist in adoption.json (unknown-slug aborts the build).
